chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-355 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of CMA No.1434/2024 3. For hearing of main case 08-05-2024 Mr. Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant Prosecutor General a/w I.O/ASI Muhammad Ayoob Khoso of PS Ghouspur.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Syed Sikander Ali Shah Advocate has filed power on behalf of respondent No.7. Respondents No.2 to 6 have filed statements. Mr. Sikander Sadar Siddiqui holding brief for Mr. Amjad Hussain Leghari Advocate for the petitioner submits that under instructions he does not press this petition because FIR being Crime No.18/2024 recorded at Police Station Ghouspur for quashment of which this petition has been filed, is to be challenged before Circuit Court Larkana as per Rule 3 of Chief Court Rules. In view of above, this petition is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
